projects.name: Brigadier
projects.description: A project I've lead since January which allows users of Roblox to bypass the platform's annoying and restrictive filter. A community of over {bUsers} premium users and {bDkUsers} developers.

projects.name: gba.js.org
projects.description: GBA Online is a light-weight online emulator for the GameBoy Advance that I worked on from October 2021 to February 2022. It's hosted online at gba.js.org.

projects.name: Simple PiP
projects.description: A Chrome extension to pop out videos from the player. This little window can be resized and moved however you'd like, and even floats on top of your other windows.
